question:
Will Country 4 take second place in Miss Universe 2025?

Description: The Miss Universe 2025 competition is scheduled to be held in Thailand on November 21, 2025. You can find more information about that here: https://www.missuniverse.com/the-competition-thailand/

This market will resolve according to the listed country represented by the contestant named first runner-up in this competition. 

If the result of this competition isn't known by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on official results as reported by the Miss Universe Organization.

evidences.title: Sash Factor, Missosology place PH bet Ahtisa Manalo among final picks ahead of Miss Universe 2025 coronation • PhilSTAR Life
evidences.content: # Sash Factor, Missosology place PH bet Ahtisa Manalo among final picks ahead of Miss Universe 2025 coronation. Miss Universe Philippines Ahtisa Manalo is gaining significant momentum hours ahead of the final competition, solidifying her status as a top contender by placing highly in major pageant predictions. She notably secured spots in the Top 5 of both Sash Factor and Missosology's hot picks, placing third in the former's Miss Universe 2025 final sash pick. Completing Sash Factor's top 5 picks are Miss Venezuela Stephany Abasali in the fourth spot and Puerto Rico's Zashley Alicea in the fifth spot. Meanwhile, beauty pageant platform Missology also released its final picks, placing Thailand in the top spot, with Colombia in second, Mexico in third, the Philippines in fourth, and Coté d'Ivoire in fifth. The 74th Miss Universe pageant's final competition is taking place in Bangkok, Thailand Friday, Nov. 21, at 9 a.m. Manila time. TAGS: sash factor missosology ahtisa manalo 74th Miss Universe.

evidences.title: The Legacy | Miss Universe
evidences.content: Fátima Bosch Fernández embodies beauty, compassion, and resilience. Born in Villahermosa, Tabasco, Mexico, she carries a deep love for nature and pride in her state’s vibrant culture. A devoted animal advocate with a creative spirit, she is driven by purpose, empathy, and continuous personal growth. ## 2024 ## Miss Universe ## 2024 ## Denmark ## Victoria Kjær Theilvig ## Birthdate: 13 November 2003 Victoria Kjær Theilvig, embodies beauty, resilience, and leadership. A European and World Championship dancer, beauty entrepreneur, mental health advocate, protector of animals, and aspiring lawyer. [...] At the age of 55, she suffered an ischemic stroke that paralyzed the left side of her body and affected the frontotemporal region of her brain, impairing her comprehension, expression, and memory. She was widowed in 2009 and, a year later, to lead a quieter life, she moved to Gramado, in the state of Rio Grande do Sul, where she now lives with her daughter and grandchildren, Enzo and Carmela. She was recently honored during the Miss Universe Brazil 2024 celebration. #### Born in Porto Alegre, Brazil, in 1944, Iêda Maria Brutto Vargas was the first Brazilian woman to be crowned Miss U...

evidences.title: Voting Rules - Miss Universe
evidences.content: Eligibility: Voting is open to anyone 14 or older, worldwide. Notwithstanding the foregoing, any country or area that is now included in the Territory, but later appears on Administrator’s list of “restricted territories,” or becomes subject to trade sanctions imposed by the United States or the United Nations, shall be immediately and specifically excluded from the Territory, and such residents will not be able to vote in this contest. Timing: The Voting Period for the Global Vote will begin on November 14, 2024 and end at 12:00 PM EST on November 16, 2024 (the “Voting Period”). The Voting Period for the Best Costume competition will be announced subsequently (the “Voting Period”). Votes received outside of the Voting Period will not be counted. [...] Administrators may, in their sole discretion, either: (a) advance the contestant who received the second highest number of valid votes; (b) utilize solely the judges’ scores to select the contestants to advance; or (c) employ any other fair and equitable resolution determined by the Administrators. The Administrators shall, in their sole discretion, determine what constitutes a valid vote. Release: Administrators, NBCUniversal His...
